name: Vec2 Math
description: 2D vector operations: add, sub, mul, len, normalize, dot, distance
author: pico8ide
code:
function v2(x,y) return {x=x,y=y} end
function v2add(a,b) return v2(a.x+b.x,a.y+b.y) end
function v2sub(a,b) return v2(a.x-b.x,a.y-b.y) end
function v2mul(a,s) return v2(a.x*s,a.y*s) end
function v2len(a) return sqrt(a.x*a.x+a.y*a.y) end
function v2norm(a) local l=v2len(a) if l==0 then return v2(0,0) end return v2(a.x/l,a.y/l) end
function v2dot(a,b) return a.x*b.x+a.y*b.y end
function v2dist(a,b) return v2len(v2sub(a,b)) end
